title: lasianthus loeiensis
intro: Lasianthus loeiensis is a species of plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the tea family, and is native to Thailand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lasianthus loeiensis include reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve immune function. The herbal preparations of Lasianthus loeiensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which are consumed as teas or used in topical applications.
